# Theatron

> Fleet desktop UI infrastructure for Dioxus, Blitz, TUI, OS services, HTTP/SSE, components, and design-token linting.

Theatron is consumed by aletheia, kanon/chalkeion, harmonia, akroasis, and future fleet desktop surfaces. v1.0.0 froze the first stable API; v1.1.0 is additive.

## Libraries

The public surface is the eight Rust crates under `crates/`: `themelion`, `mekhane`, `bathron`, `keryx`, `skeue`, `gramma`, `parodos`, and `dokimasia`.

## Architecture

Structured LLM corpus:
- [_llm/architecture.toml](_llm/architecture.toml): crate roles and UI layers
- [_llm/current_state.toml](_llm/current_state.toml): releases and active rollout threads
- [_llm/decisions.toml](_llm/decisions.toml): accepted UI-substrate decisions
- [_llm/glossary.toml](_llm/glossary.toml): crate vocabulary

## Agent Entry Points

- [README.md](README.md): overview and crate table
- [kanon/projects/theatron/STATE.md](http://forge.forkwright.com/forkwright/kanon/tree/main/projects/theatron/STATE.md): release and consumer status
- [kanon/projects/theatron/ROADMAP.md](http://forge.forkwright.com/forkwright/kanon/tree/main/projects/theatron/ROADMAP.md): phase plan
- [_meta/INTEGRATION.md](_meta/INTEGRATION.md): consumer integration guide
- [kanon/projects/theatron/DASHBOARD_LIFECYCLE.md](http://forge.forkwright.com/forkwright/kanon/tree/main/projects/theatron/DASHBOARD_LIFECYCLE.md): dashboard/view lifecycle registry
- [examples/](examples/): minimal, tray smoke, and full app examples
